slides.title: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Initiation Note
slides.subtitle: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd | BUY
slides.rationale: Introduce the company and headline recommendation.

slides.title: Investment Thesis
slides.rationale: Lead with the core investment case.

blocks.content: Motilal Oswal Financial Services is one of the most diversified capital-markets franchises in India, with a structurally improving mix of annuity-style asset management and wealth fees offsetting cyclicality in broking and investment banking. The next leg of growth is being driven by strong client additions, AUM compounding in AMC and PWM, and operating leverage in housing finance.

items: Motilal Oswal Financial Services is one of the most diversified capital-markets franchises in India, with a structurally improving mix of annuity-style asset ma
Wealth and AMC are scaling annuity revenues, reducing earnings volatility.
Retail broking continues to gain incremental market share among active clients.
Housing finance has turned the corner on asset quality with disciplined growth.
Proprietary book provides a credible long-term capital allocation tailwind.

slides.title: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd At A Glance
slides.rationale: Provide company context and headline metrics.

blocks.content: Motilal Oswal Financial Services is a diversified financial services group with leadership in retail broking, asset management, wealth management, investment banking, and housing finance, supported by a meaningful proprietary investment book.

slides.title: Industry Overview
slides.rationale: Set the sector context for the thesis.

blocks.content: Indian capital-markets franchises continue to benefit from rising household equity allocation, demat additions, and SIP penetration. Wealth and asset-management economics are migrating toward fee-based annuity revenue, narrowing the cyclicality gap with private banks.

items: Indian capital-markets franchises continue to benefit from rising household equity allocation, demat additions, and SIP penetration. Wealth and asset-management

slides.title: Key Catalysts
slides.rationale: Catalysts to watch for the thesis to play out.

blocks.content:
- Sustained AMC AUM growth and improvement in industry market share.
- PWM net-new-money momentum and yield resilience.
- Operating leverage as broking technology spend matures.
- Recovery in capital-markets activity boosting investment banking and broking.

items: Sustained AMC AUM growth and improvement in industry market share.
PWM net-new-money momentum and yield resilience.
Operating leverage as broking technology spend matures.
Recovery in capital-markets activity boosting investment banking and broking.
Cyclical drawdowns in capital-markets activity hurt broking revenue.
Mark-to-market on the proprietary book can introduce earnings volatility.
Regulatory tightening on broking pricing or distribution economics.
Competitive intensity from discount brokers compressing yields.
Housing finance asset-quality slippage in stressed credit cycles.
